title: Blick Intro — Smoke
purpose: Standard Blick brand intro. Smoke/fluid visual theme — the default brand video for all standard contexts. Fluid motion aligns directly with drilling fluids brand identity.
usageRule: DEFAULT — use for all standard contexts: website, presentations, LinkedIn, email, trade shows. Smoke is the canonical Blick intro.
audience: Prospective customers, website visitors, presentation audiences.
nextSteps: Embed on blick.group homepage as the hero brand video
Upload to YouTube as the canonical brand intro
Use smoke/fluid motion as the primary visual direction reference for all Hyperframes compositions
